Class SidebarView

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
com.cluegame.gui.SidebarView
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class SidebarView extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
Sidebar panel for the Clue! GUI. Shows the current player's turn info, their hand of cards, action buttons and a scrollable game log. Handles full turn flow including AI turns and human handoff.
Author:
Thanh Shaw

    • AI_ONLY_MAX_ROUNDS

      private static final int AI_ONLY_MAX_ROUNDS
      Maximum number of full rounds (each active AI gets one turn per round) before the AI-only endgame gives up. With 3 AI players and 50 rounds, that is up to 150 individual turns — enough time to explore and deduce.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • SidebarView

      public SidebarView(GameController controller, BoardView boardView, NotebookView notebookView)
      Creates the sidebar with all UI components, wired to the controller.
      Parameters:
      controller - the game controller managing turn state
      boardView - the board view to refresh after actions
